name: poma-grill-mcp
description: MCP server for the POMA Grill context engine API
long_description: Ingest documents and run semantic search against the POMA Grill context engine directly from your desktop MCP host. Provides ingest (and variants), job status, search, and explain tools for RAG workflows.

tools.name: grill_ingest
tools.description: Ingest a document into the context engine

tools.name: grill_ingest_sync
tools.description: Ingest a document and wait for completion

tools.name: grill_ingest_batch
tools.description: Ingest multiple documents in one call

tools.name: grill_jobs_status
tools.description: Check the status of ingest jobs

tools.name: grill_docs_list
tools.description: List documents ingested for the authenticated namespace

api_key.title: POMA API Key
api_key.description: Your POMA Grill Project or Account key. Stored securely by host.
